fmiModelDescription.description: Internal + conformal fuel storage management with transfer pumps feeding engine feed tanks.

ScalarVariable.name: fuel_consumption_rate.mass_flow_kgps
ScalarVariable.description: Propulsion-requested fuel mass flow entering storage manager.

ScalarVariable.name: fuelState.fuel_remaining_kg
ScalarVariable.description: Telemetry describing remaining fuel mass/normalized level.

ScalarVariable.name: fuelState.fuel_level_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Telemetry describing remaining fuel mass/normalized level.

ScalarVariable.name: fuelState.fuel_starved
ScalarVariable.description: Telemetry describing remaining fuel mass/normalized level.
